plugins.name: composer-changelog
plugins.description: Analyze composer.lock diffs for Drupal projects and produce a Markdown changelog report.

plugins.name: ddev-setup
plugins.description: Set up a functional DDEV environment for Drupal or WordPress projects.

plugins.name: screenshot-skill-init
plugins.description: Scaffold project-specific screenshot + compare skills for visual regression.

plugins.name: timesheet
plugins.description: Fill out Harvest timesheets from daily log files; includes a post-commit hook that records commits to a daily report.

plugins.name: value-estimates
plugins.description: Generate value-based estimate reports comparing GitLab ticket estimates to Harvest actuals.

plugins.name: wp-maintenance-tools
plugins.description: Maintenance skills for WordPress projects on DDEV. Bundles wordpress-update-check: a per-plugin risk report based on actual code diffs between installed and incoming versions.
